items.q: Is there really a free trial?
items.a: Yes — 30 days of full access, no credit card required. Cancel anytime.
English, Amharic, Afan Oromo, and Tigrigna across the entire interface.
TemariFlow is a Progressive Web App with offline-first features for attendance and notes.
All paid plans include onboarding. Premium includes on-site training for your team.
Yes. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest, with role-based access controls.

items.q: Can we migrate from another system?
items.a: Absolutely. Our team helps import your existing data during onboarding.
